proposals.summary: Monthly figures from India's Directorate General of Civil Aviation covering domestic passengers carried, load factors, cancellations, and market share by airline. Researchers use it to track carrier performance and city-pair demand across Indian airports.
proposals.bestFor: Tracking domestic airline market share, passenger volumes, and city-pair demand trends in India
proposals.limitations: Data is released as monthly PDF packs that require manual extraction, and international traffic detail is limited.
proposals.notes: Freely downloadable from the DGCA site; expect to scrape or hand-key figures from monthly PDFs for time-series work.
